lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

The car is in mint condition. The exterior is free of any blemishes or damage. The interior is in like-new condition with no visible wear. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order with a complete service history.
This vehicle is in mint condition. It shows no signs of wear and is in exceptional mechanical and cosmetic state. All components are in perfect working order.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. The engine runs but has a noticeable knock, and the transmission slips occasionally. The exterior shows substantial rust on the rocker panels and several large dents on the passenger side. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with multiple tears and a persistent musty odor. This car is being sold as-is and is best suited for someone looking for a major project or a source of spare parts.

Experience the perfect blend of reliability and style with this fantastic find! This vehicle is in good condition, having been well-cared for and consistently maintained. It offers a smooth, comfortable ride and looks wonderful both inside and out. It's ready to hit the road and provide its next owner with many more miles of enjoyment!

This vehicle is in poor overall condition and is being sold strictly as-is for parts or as a significant restoration project. The engine currently runs but suffers from heavy oil consumption and a persistent overheating issue that needs immediate diagnostic attention. The transmission shifts harshly, and the suspension components are severely worn, resulting in a compromised ride. Externally, the body shows extensive rust on the wheel wells and several large dents, while the clear coat is peeling across the hood and roof. The interior has seen heavy wear, with multiple tears in the fabric seats and several non-operational dashboard controls. This car requires substantial mechanical and cosmetic work to return to a reliable state.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a refined driving experience, balancing robust performance with sophisticated styling. Extensively inspected to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal, it represents an exceptional value for the discerning motorist seeking reliability and prestige without compromise.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s looking for a new home! It’s been super well-loved and is still in great shape, running smoothly and ready for many more adventures. Whether you're commuting or hitting the road for a weekend trip, this car has plenty of life left in it. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love how it handles!

This E92 M3 is a driver’s specimen featuring the high-revving S65 4.0L V8 naturally aspirated engine, delivering a linear power band up to its 8,400 RPM redline. The 6-speed manual transmission offers precise engagement, paired with a variable M differential lock for optimal corner-exit traction. Recent preventative maintenance includes rod bearing replacement and updated throttle actuators, ensuring the valvetrain and induction systems remain robust. The chassis is equipped with Electronic Damping Control (EDC) and remains balanced with neutral turn-in characteristics. While showing minor aesthetic patina consistent with spirited use, the mechanical integrity and subframe rigidity are excellent.
Used car in good condition. Runs well. Clean interior. Recent maintenance completed. Title in hand.

This well-maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, glossy shine, though it shows a few minor character marks consistent with responsible daily use. Inside, the cabin is a clean and comfortable environment; the premium upholstery is in great shape with only slight softening on the driver's side bolster, and all electronic features—from the high-definition infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control—function exactly as they should. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and has been serviced at regular intervals, with no known mechanical issues or fluid leaks. It handles predictably on the road and offers a quiet, composed ride that feels solid at highway speeds. Included with the sale are a complete set of service records and a clean title. This is an excellent opportunity to own a dependable, high-quality car that has many miles of enjoyment left to give.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer, offering a harmonious balance of mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Meticulously maintained and rigorously inspected, it delivers a refined driving experience and consistent performance. An exceptional acquisition for those who demand quality and reliability in a professional-grade motorcar.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This specimen offers consistent performance and a refined driving experience, having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for quality. An exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a premier balance of durability and value.

Used car in good condition. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Title in hand.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and comfort, presenting in impressive condition both inside and out. The exterior retains a brilliant luster, showing only the minor, expected signs of careful road use, while the body panels remain straight and free of significant blemishes. Inside, you’ll find a smoke-free cabin with plush, well-preserved seating and a dashboard that looks nearly new; every button, switch, and climate control setting functions exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and quietly, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule and recent fluid services. The transmission shifts seamlessly, and the suspension provides a firm yet comfortable ride. Equipped with premium features and a clean history, this car is turn-key ready for its next owner who appreciates a vehicle that has been treated with genuine care.

This vehicle exemplifies a balanced synthesis of reliability and sophisticated engineering. A distinguished choice for the professional seeking a high-caliber driving experience without compromise.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and it’s looking for a great new home! It’s been well-loved and is in really solid shape—super reliable and perfect for daily commutes or weekend adventures. It drives like a dream and has plenty of life left in it. Come take it for a spin, you won't be disappointed!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six engine, producing 333 hp with a high-revving 8,000 RPM redline. It features a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission and the factory variable M differential lock for optimal power delivery. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from documented rear subframe reinforcement and refreshed bushings. Mechanically sound with a recent VANOS overhaul and rod bearing service, this M3 provides linear throttle response via its individual throttle bodies
Well-maintained vehicle. Runs well. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. All systems functional.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of performance and daily utility, maintained with a focus on longevity. The exterior finish retains a high gloss, though close inspection reveals a few minor stone chips on the hood and a small scuff on the passenger-side rear bumper consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the premium upholstery shows light natural wear on the driver's side bolster but remains firm and supportive, while all electronic features—including the navigation system and dual-zone climate control—function exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is in robust health; the engine pulls smoothly through all gears with no fluid leaks or warning lights. It has been serviced at regular intervals, with the most recent oil change and multi-point inspection completed just last month. The tires have plenty of life left, and the suspension remains tight, providing a quiet and composed ride. This is a reliable, well-cared-for example that is ready for its next owner to drive away with confidence.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic, this model balances performance with long-term reliability. Every aspect of this automobile has been vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for quality and roadworthiness, offering a distinguished driving experience.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating a consistent history of care and mechanical integrity, it offers a refined driving experience and an aesthetic appeal that commands respect on the road. We invite you to secure a vehicle that strikes an ideal balance between sophisticated engineering and enduring value.

It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-loved, making it the perfect companion for your daily commutes or weekend adventures. It runs smoothly and still has plenty of life left in it! Feel free to reach out if you want to come by and take it for a spin—I’m sure you’ll love it as much as I have!

This 987.2-generation mid-engine coupe features the robust 3.4L DFI flat-six, delivering linear power delivery and a visceral exhaust note. Meticulously maintained, the drivetrain remains tight with no bore scoring or IMS concerns typical of earlier iterations. It features the desirable 6-speed manual transaxle for precise engagement. The chassis is equipped with PASM for variable damping and a mechanical LSD to optimize corner-exit traction. Recent service includes a full cooling system refresh and high-temp brake fluid flush for the four-piston monoblock calipers. While showing minor patina consistent with a well-loved driver's car, the structural rigidity and throttle
Used sedan. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs smooth. No repairs needed.

Offered here is a well-maintained vehicle that presents beautifully and drives with confidence. The exterior finish retains a deep gloss, complemented by clean alloy wheels and clear lens housings, though minor, age-appropriate imperfections like small stone chips are visible upon close inspection. Inside, the cabin remains highly preserved; the leather seating is supple with only light creasing on the driver’s bolster, and the dashboard remains free of any cracks or sun damage. All electronic components, including the dual-zone climate control and premium sound system, are fully operational. Under the hood, the engine is clean and responsive, benefiting from a documented history of regular oil changes and a recent brake service. The transmission shifts smoothly through all gears, and the tires have ample tread remaining for several seasons of driving. This is a solid, reliable choice for anyone seeking a premium driving experience without the new-car price tag.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. While it displays the expected character of a pre-owned vehicle, its structural and operational excellence remains unquestioned. A premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balanced investment in quality and value.
